meaning: int.夏威夷人问候语,欢迎,再见
examples: Hawaii, far out in the Pacific Ocean, is the Aloha State.
Sal: Hard to know for sure, but we believe in aloha 'aina: love of the land.
But its contract with Aloha Airgroup, parent of the distressed airline, has brought angry charges of greed.
It just won FCC approval for its October purchase of spectrum from a Rhode Island-based private firm, Aloha Partners.
